notes: Migration-clean 2026-06-23 (batch 3); record: claims/B4-MASS-GAP/notes/b4-massgap-migration-260623-260623-v1.0.tex.txt. Numerical anchor remains PACKAGE-PENDING (production-PDE provenance; re-execution waived).
title: BCC ground-state uniqueness within the single-mode constraint cone
statement: The BCC ground state is unique within the single-mode ansatz class intersected with the Math56 constraint cone; the numerical anchor $m^{*2}=+4.247\times 10^{-2}$ at $\mu^2=+5\times 10^{-3}$ reproduces to 4 digits on the subset-4-cosine branch (metastable-branch anchor, not ground state).
scope: CLOSED@SINGLE-MODE-CONE. The legacy 'PROVED' label is exactly this pinned scope. Three-regime continuation structure (pitchfork at mu^2 approx -0.05 +/- 0.03; branch termination mu^2 <= -0.5) is recorded evidence; Regime-III interpretation remains undetermined per the legacy G2 audit.
falsifier: A second distinct minimiser within the single-mode + cone class at the operating point, or failure to reproduce the anchor within stated tolerance.
no_overclaim: Ground-state uniqueness beyond the single-mode cone; ground-state status of the subset-4-cosine anchor.
next_action: Ground-state continuation with the full 12-mode bcc_analytic seed (legacy Math82-H queue) under TSv2 run recording.
